baseline_note: Every design system benchmark expects compile-ready SwiftUI using the token system (Space, Radius, Color, Font tokens). Components must include accessibility support (Dynamic Type, VoiceOver, minimum 44pt tap targets) by default.

evals.prompt: Create a design token system with spacing, colors, and typography for my iOS app
evals.expected_output: Space, Radius, Color, and Font token definitions with semantic naming
expectations: Defines a Space enum with at least xs/s/m/l/xl constants
Defines a Radius enum with size constants
Defines semantic Color extensions (appBackground, textPrimary, accentPrimary, strokeSubtle, etc.)
Defines Font extensions with role-based scale (dsBody, dsTitle, dsCaption, etc.)
Code is compile-ready Swift

evals.prompt: Build a reusable button component with primary and destructive variants for use across multiple features
evals.expected_output: Reusable SwiftUI button using design tokens with accessibility support and multiple variants
expectations: Uses design tokens for color, spacing, and corner radius — no hardcoded values
Supports at least two visual variants
Minimum 44pt tap target
Includes accessibilityLabel and accessibilityAddTraits(.isButton)
Supports Dynamic Type scaling
Code is compile-ready Swift

evals.prompt: Add Liquid Glass styling to a card component for iOS 26+ with a graceful fallback for earlier versions
evals.expected_output: SwiftUI card with glassEffect for iOS 26+ and .ultraThinMaterial fallback for iOS 17
expectations: Uses @available(iOS 26.0, *) or if #available(iOS 26, *) guard for the glass variant
Applies .glassEffect modifier for iOS 26+
Provides a fallback using .background(.ultraThinMaterial) or equivalent for earlier iOS
Code is compile-ready Swift

evals.prompt: Create a reusable empty state view with an icon, title, subtitle, and optional action button
evals.expected_output: EmptyState component using design tokens with VoiceOver support and optional CTA
expectations: Uses design tokens for spacing, typography, and color — no hardcoded values
Accepts title and subtitle as LocalizedStringKey
Action button is optional (nil by default)
Decorative icon is hidden from VoiceOver
Code is compile-ready Swift

evals.prompt: Update the spacing system to use an 8pt base grid and add xxl (32pt) and xxxl (48pt) values
evals.expected_output: Updated Space enum with 8pt grid values and additional size constants
expectations: All spacing values are multiples of 8
Adds xxl (32pt) and xxxl (48pt) constants
Existing Space constants remain present and unchanged
Code is compile-ready Swift
